description: Install cert-manager using the manifest at /home/ga/Desktop/cert-manager.yaml. Configure a self-signed ClusterIssuer named 'local-selfsigned'. In the 'e-commerce' namespace, create an Ingress named 'shop-ingress' for the host 'shop.example.com' targeting the 'shop-frontend' service on port 80. The Ingress must be configured to automatically request a TLS certificate from the 'local-selfsigned' ClusterIssuer and store it in a secret named 'shop-tls-secret'. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
